narrative:
Precinct Georges Run (precinct in Jefferson County) has 454 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.7 percentage points.
